@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "flatcar-container-linux-737-new-package-request-qemu-guest-agent",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "flatcar-container-linux: New Package Request: [qemu-guest-agent]",
+    "description": "New Package Request: [qemu-guest-agent]. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current flatcar-container-linux deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your flatcar-container-linux version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux\nhelm list -n flatcar-container-linux 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working flatcar-container-linux installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review flatcar-container-linux configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant flatcar-container-linux configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux\nkubectl get configmap -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flatcar-container-linux\n```\nHello!\n\nI'm improvising a format as per #736.\n\nWhen running Flatcar as a guest/vm in Proxmox, there is no proper way to poweroff or restart Flatcar instances."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for New Package Request: [qemu-guest-agent]",
+        "description": "It should start automatically if you set `hw_qemu_guest_agent=yes` in your openstack instance config. You can testdrive one of the images from here: https://bincache.flatcar-linux.net/images/amd64/3396.0.0+qemu-guest-agent/.\n```yaml\nMariaDB > use nova\nMariaDB [nova]> insert into instance_system_metadata (created_at, instance_uuid, `key`, value, deleted) VALUES (NOW(), '<InstanceID>', 'image_hw_qemu_guest_agent', 'yes', 0);\nQuery OK, 1 row affected (0.035 sec)\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux\nkubectl get events -n flatcar-container-linux --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"New Package Request: [qemu-guest-agent]\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "It should start automatically if you set `hw_qemu_guest_agent=yes` in your openstack instance config. You can testdrive one of the images from here: https://bincache.flatcar-linux.net/images/amd64/3396.0.0+qemu-guest-agent/.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "MariaDB > use nova\nMariaDB [nova]> insert into instance_system_metadata (created_at, instance_uuid, `key`, value, deleted) VALUES (NOW(), '<InstanceID>', 'image_hw_qemu_guest_agent', 'yes', 0);\nQuery OK, 1 row affected (0.035 sec)"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
